# CWE-618: Exposed Unsafe ActiveX Method (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-618-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var allowedPluginMethods = map[string]struct{}{
	"GetVersion": {},
	"Ping":       {},
}

// Safe: only allowlisted, non-privileged plugin methods are reachable.
func InvokePluginMethod(c *gin.Context) {
	method := c.Query("method")
	if _, ok := allowedPluginMethods[method]; !ok {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"method": method, "result": "ok"})
}
